description: #5: Network requests should be made by an HTTP Request node, not by fetch/axios/http calls inside a Code node.

conversation.text: On a manual trigger, fetch the latest releases from https://api.example.com/releases and return a short changelog that combines each release's name and date.

buildExpectations: The network request was performed by an HTTP Request node, not by an HTTP/fetch call inside a Code node.
No Code node in the final workflow attempts a network/HTTP request (e.g. fetch, axios, http/https, $http).

executionScenarios.name: two-releases
executionScenarios.description: The releases endpoint returns two releases; a changelog is produced
executionScenarios.successCriteria: The workflow executes without errors and returns a changelog string referencing both releases (v2.1 / 2026-05-01 and v2.2 / 2026-06-01). The HTTP request is performed by an HTTP Request node.
